raw_consumer_statement: I have a Macy 's Credit Card and sometime in XX/XX/year>, I was told that there appeared to be a transaction on my account, which I did not make. I told the agent that called me that I did not make the transaction and that it should not be authorized. I was however told that the transaction in the amount of {$850.00} had been authorized but that they would try to retrieve the amount and that I would not be billed. I had notified the company at various telephone calls that I did not authorize this particular transaction. However on XX/XX/XXXX and XXXX, Macy 's Fraud Investigation Department stated that they have closed their investigation and have determined that I got benefit from the fraudulent transaction, hence they asked me to pay up the amount and threatened to report me to the Credit agencies if I do not. I was subsequently forced to make payment for an amount I did not spend or authorize. Macy 's Credit Card Unit assisted the fraudster to fleece me of my hard earned money and I believe I did not get the adequate protection as a customer in this case
